record.comment: As added Pub. L. 115-254, div. J, sec. 1811(a), Oct. 5, 2018, 132 Stat. 3538.
As added Pub. L. 115-387, sec. 2(d), 132 Stat. 5167.
As added Pub. L. 115-254, div. K, title I, sec. 1913(a), Oct. 5, 2018, 132 Stat. 3554.
As added Pub. L. 115-254, div. K, title I, sec. 1918(a), Oct. 5, 2018, 132 Stat. 3558.

Two triggers here: Pub. L. 115-387 sec. 2(a)(2) first repealed actsec 1901 classified to 6/591, then inserted a new actsec 1901, same classification. Table III entry for repeal should be deleted, superseded by subsequent new section.
As added Pub. L. 115-387 sec. 2(a)(3), 132 Stat. 5163.
As added Pub. L. 115-387 sec. 2(a)(3), 132 Stat. 5163.
As added Pub. L. 115-387 sec. 2(a)(10), 132 Stat. 5164.
As added Pub. L. 115-387 sec. 2(c)(2), 132 Stat. 5166.
As added Pub. L. 115-278, sec. 2(a), Nov. 16, 2018, 132 Stat. 4169.
As added Pub. L. 115-278, sec. 2(a), Nov. 16, 2018, 132 Stat. 4169.
As added Pub. L. 115-278, sec. 2(a), Nov. 16, 2018, 132 Stat. 4169.
As added Pub. L. 115-278, sec. 2(a), Nov. 16, 2018, 132 Stat. 4169.
Former sec. 210E renumbered sec. 2214; 6/124l tr to 6/664.
